system.description:
Roll +Mind when something catches your attention and you try to see what it is.

10+: Ask two questions.

7-9: Ask one: Is anyone or anything sneaking around? Did it seem dangerous? How do we get out of here? What did it look like?

results.partial: Ask one: Is anyone or anything sneaking around? Did it seem dangerous? How do we get out of here? What did it look like?
